scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix server && npm i --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.desktop: npm run desktop:build && npm start --prefix desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:build && npm --prefix desktop run stage && npm --prefix desktop run dist
